overall.description: A cinematic first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk office lobby on the '7th Floor'. The environment features sleek black architecture, bioluminescent pink branch sculptures, lush indoor planters with a prominent bonsai tree, holographic data displays, and a minimalist reception desk. The high-fidelity game engine rendering showcases reflective marble floors, dramatic artificial lighting, and neon accents throughout the empty commercial space.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view down a sleek, dark lobby corridor. The camera moves forward over polished marble floors, flanked by black planters containing bioluminescent pink branch sculptures. Overhead, a grid of linear lights illuminates the path toward a distant reception area.

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrower side corridor, revealing a digital display wall showing data visualizations and a bamboo garden installation. The space feels more enclosed as the camera approaches elevator doors at the end of the hall, passing modern bench seating.

segments.scene_description: Turning back toward the central atrium, the camera approaches a massive illuminated planter featuring a striking bonsai tree. The space opens up significantly, revealing the full scale of the lobby. The camera circles the planter, showcasing the integrated bench seating and lush tropical undergrowth beneath the tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: reception desk area with holographic data visualizations

approaching the reception counter with the large circular logo and red holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the reception area, passing the central planter to approach the main desk. The circular logo glows brightly on the wall behind the counter, accompanied by red holographic data visualizations. The camera explores the desk area, revealing office chairs and detailed textures of the dark wood and illuminated surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sleek, dark cyberpunk lobby that transitions from a narrow corridor into a vast, illuminated central atrium. It begins by gliding over polished marble floors flanked by bioluminescent pink branch sculptures, moving steadily toward a distant reception area. As the camera turns right, the space becomes more enclosed, passing a digital display wall and a bamboo garden installation before approaching a set of elevator doors. The scene then opens up significantly as the camera pivots back toward the center to circle a massive illuminated planter featuring a striking bonsai tree and lush tropical undergrowth. Finally, the movement flows toward the main reception desk, where the view settles on a glowing circular logo and red holographic data visualizations against detailed dark wood surfaces.
